source: Strimtom's DDO Leveling Guide — ST Gear Evaluation
note: Per-playstyle gear-stat priority (A>B>C) for deciding which stats matter, used for sorting the stacking matrix and for the gear-recommendation feature. 'scales' = does the value scale with item level. Ranks are per playstyle (melee/ranged/caster); a missing rank means the stat isn't prioritized for that playstyle. 'aliases' map captured item-stat names to an entry (longest match wins).

stats.name: Main Stat (STR/DEX/INT/WIS/CHA)
stats.why: Your main stat affects everything in combat (and for casters, spell points and DCs). Note: only your build's main stat is truly A — other abilities are lower.

stats.name: Constitution
stats.why: Increases HP and keeps you alive longer.

stats.name: All Saving Throws (Resistance)
stats.why: A Resistance bonus to all saves is important for resisting magical effects.

stats.name: Physical/Magical Resistance Rating (Sheltering)
stats.why: PRR/MRR reduces all damage taken — very important.

stats.name: Dodge
stats.why: Chance to avoid damage entirely. Very good.

stats.name: Fortification
stats.why: Protects from critical hits and sneak attacks.

stats.name: Healing/Repair/Negative Amplification
stats.why: Increases healing received from all sources.

stats.name: True Seeing
stats.why: See invisible creatures and bypass illusion; also finds secret doors.

stats.name: Deathblock/Lifesealed
stats.why: Prevents instant-kill effects, which become common after level 10.

stats.name: Freedom of Movement
stats.why: Immunity to most crowd control and slows.

stats.name: Melee Power
stats.why: Increases melee damage by 1% per point.

stats.name: Ranged Power
stats.why: Increases ranged damage by 1% per point.

stats.name: Doublestrike
stats.why: Chance to double your melee damage. Capped at 100%.

stats.name: Doubleshot
stats.why: Chance to double your ranged damage; past 100% enables triple/quint shots.

stats.name: Accuracy
stats.why: Increases chance to hit.

stats.name: Deadly
stats.why: Increases damage on each attack.

stats.name: Seeker
stats.why: Increases critical damage and critical confirm.

stats.name: Deception
stats.why: Increases sneak-attack damage.

stats.name: Improved Deception
stats.why: Lets you sneak-attack monsters attacking you; some versions grant stacking bluff.

stats.name: Speed (attack & movement)
stats.why: Increases attack and movement speed.

stats.name: Armor Piercing
stats.why: Bypass enemy fortification; crit/sneak normally-immune monsters.

stats.name: Spell Power
stats.why: Increases spell damage/healing by 1% per point. Mandatory for strong spells.

stats.name: Spell Critical (Lore)
stats.why: Increases spell critical chance (+50% effect).

stats.name: Wizardry (Spell Points)
stats.why: Increases spell points — more spells.

stats.name: Spell School DCs
stats.why: Makes your spells of a school harder to resist.

stats.name: Spell Cost Reduction
stats.why: Reduces the cost of all spells (not spell-like abilities).

stats.name: Spell Penetration
stats.why: Bypass enemy spell resistance (niche).

stats.name: Spell Critical Multiplier
stats.why: Increases the effect of spell crits.

stats.name: Caster Level Bonuses
stats.why: Higher caster level = more damage and spell pen. Niche.

stats.name: Metamagic Cost Reduction
stats.why: Reduces metamagic feat cost. Rare.

stats.name: Turning Bonuses
stats.why: Increases turn-undead power. Cleric/paladin only.

stats.name: Concealment
stats.why: Chance monsters miss you; ignored by true seeing / reaper.

stats.name: Incorporeality
stats.why: Chance monsters miss you; ignored by incorporeal monsters / reaper. Grants ghost touch.

stats.name: False Life/Vitality
stats.why: Increases max HP. False Life stacks with Vitality.

stats.name: Elemental Absorption
stats.why: Reduces a damage type by %, applied after PRR/MRR and resist.

stats.name: Threat Reduction
stats.why: Less aggro. Mandatory for raiding, irrelevant solo.

stats.name: Spell Saves
stats.why: Saves vs spell effects; stacks with regular saves.

stats.name: Relentless Fury
stats.why: +5% damage after a kill. Stacks with everything.

stats.name: Stunning
stats.why: Increases DC of stun effects.

stats.name: Shatter (Sunder)
stats.why: Increases DC of sunder effects.

stats.name: Vertigo (Trip)
stats.why: Increases DC of trip effects.

stats.name: Assassinate
stats.why: Increases DC of assassinate.

stats.name: Tendon Slice/Hamstring/Crippling
stats.why: Slows enemies on hit; more useful on ranged.

stats.name: AC (Deflection/Natural Armor)
stats.why: Reduces enemy hit chance; weaker than dodge and ignored by bosses.

stats.name: Feather Falling
stats.why: Slow falling; mandatory for a few raids.

stats.name: Elemental Resistance
stats.why: Flat reduction of elemental damage; good vs small hits, weak vs big hits.

stats.name: Spell Resistance
stats.why: Protects vs crowd control; hard to scale but immunity at endgame (65+).

stats.name: Individual Saving Throws (Reflex/Fortitude/Will)
stats.why: Worse than all-saves; many items give all 3.

stats.name: Skills (Any)
stats.why: Most skills aren't combat-relevant; some niche (Bluff/Intimidate/Jump/Spot/Tumble). For casters, Spellcraft/Heal/Perform feed spell power (B).
